prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为20244→22242→20885→21222→23836，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约23836名，较2024年后移约2614名，为近五年最大降幅；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年101人、2022年105人、2023年106人、2024年129人、2025年133人，逐年递增；2026年计划143人，较2025年扩招10人（+7.5%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第62名→2025年第63名→2026年第57名，排名创历史新高，学校综合实力和声誉持续提升；该校近年声誉整体平稳，2024年曾涉及师德调查事件但已妥善处理；抖音热度排名总榜第7位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映考生关注度较高，可能推高报考热度；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A、化学获评A-、材料科学与工程获评A-，三大主干学科均为A类，与该校工科试验班（化工与能源、先进材料等）、理科试验班（绿色化学）等招生专业高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 浙江省考生总数从2021年25.3万持续增长至2025年29.1万，2026年达40万人（普通高考），较2025年暴增约37.5%，竞争压力显著加大；北京化工大学位于北京市，属跨省招生；浙江省为生源大省且经济发达，考生对京沪高校偏好较强，该校在浙江招生计划持续扩招也反映了对浙江生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年扩招10人的缓解效应、软科排名升至历史新高的利好、抖音高热度的关注度提升，以及浙江省考生总数暴增约37.5%带来的竞争加剧，考虑考生规模激增的强竞争压力，小幅下调100名，预测2026年最低录取位次约24811名，区间24311–25311名。

- 计算机科学与技术。

- 工商管理类（数字财务与智能会计）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约24811名，区间24311–25311名。位次在24300名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（法学卓越班、宏德书院、计算机）；位次在24800名左右建议以二档为主（智能信息类、自动化类、双学士学位项目）；位次在25300名左右可考虑三档专业保底（先进材料、绿色化学、生物与医药等）。该校化工、材料、化学三大A类学科实力突出，相关工科试验班性价比高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were 20244 → 22242 → 20885 → 21222 → 23836, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 23836, a decrease of about 2614 places compared to 2024, the largest drop in five years. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province was 101 in 2021, 105 in 2022, 106 in 2023, 129 in 2024, and 133 in 2025, increasing year by year. The 2026 plan is 143, an increase of 10 students (+7.5%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, from 62nd in 2021 to 63rd in 2025 and 57th in 2026, a record high, indicating continuous improvement in overall strength and reputation. The school's reputation has been generally stable in recent years; although it was involved in a teacher ethics investigation in 2024, it has been properly handled. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 7th overall (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high candidate attention, which may increase application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A, Chemistry A-, and Materials Science and Engineering A-, with all three main disciplines being A-class, highly corresponding to the school's engineering experimental classes (Chemical and Energy, Advanced Materials, etc.) and science experimental classes (Green Chemistry), strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province has grown from 253,000 in 2021 to 291,000 in 2025, reaching 400,000 in 2026 (regular college entrance examination), a surge of about 37.5% compared to 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Zhejiang Province is a major source of students with a developed economy, and candidates have a strong preference for universities in Beijing and Shanghai. The school's continuous expansion of enrollment plans in Zhejiang also reflects its emphasis on Zhejiang student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the mitigating effect of expanding enrollment by 10 in 2026, the positive impact of the Soft Science ranking reaching a record high, the increased attention from high Douyin popularity, and the intensified competition due to a surge of about 37.5% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, with the strong competitive pressure from the sharp increase in candidate numbers, a slight downward adjustment of 100 places is made. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 24811, with a range of 24311–25311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Biology and Medicine)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 24811, range 24311–25311. Candidates with rankings within 24300 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law Excellent Class, Hongde Academy, Computer Science); those around 24800 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Intelligent Information Class, Automation Class, Dual Degree Programs); those around 25300 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Advanced Materials, Green Chemistry, Biology and Medicine, etc.). The school's three A-class disciplines of Chemical Engineering, Materials, and Chemistry are outstanding, and related engineering experimental classes offer high cost-performance, worthy of attention.
